## What would you like to add?

Describe the proposed feature.

## Why is this useful?

Explain the use case or workflow it supports.

## Proposed behavior

Describe the route, query parameter, output, or asset behavior you expect.

## Alternatives considered

List any simpler alternatives or workarounds.
